name: ssot-tb-verilog
description: SSOT->TB Verilog/SystemVerilog: derive a plain HDL testbench from YAML and RTL, run iverilog/vvp, emit reports, or escalate precise failures

tasks.content: [SSOT->VerilogTB] Parse SSOT, RTL, and build verification ledger
tasks.detail: Read SSOT YAML, <ip>/verify/equivalence_goals.json when present, RTL filelist, and all referenced RTL files. Derive plain HDL testbench tasks from SSOT top_module, parameters, io_list, function_model, cycle_model, registers, features, dataflow, interrupts, memory, fsm, test_requirements.scenarios, and equivalence goals. Use this backend only when the project/SSOT requests SV-only or cocotb/UVM is unavailable.
tasks.criteria:
SSOT, equivalence goals, and RTL were read
python3 workflow/tb-gen/runtime/equivalence_scoreboard.py <ip> --root . --self-check passes when FunctionalModel is present
Every DUT top port has a declaration/drive/monitor plan
Every SSOT scenario maps to a Verilog/SV task and checker
Every non-blocked equivalence goal maps to a scoreboard event row or precise blocker
Coverage/report bins are planned from SSOT
No fixed IP-specific generator was added

tasks.detail: Write <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv and optional <ip>/tb/tc_<ip>.sv / model files. Include clock/reset, DUT instantiation, protocol tasks derived from io_list, expected-value model_adapter/reference_model from SSOT/FunctionalModel, scenario tasks for every SSOT scenario, scoreboard_events.jsonl writer, $dumpfile/$dumpvars VCD setup, PASS/FAIL counters, and fatal assertion behavior. The expected-value path may be a generated plain-HDL adapter or a Python precomputed stimulus/expected bridge, but it must preserve FunctionalModel/SSOT expected behavior and must not copy observed RTL behavior. Any [FAIL] must call $fatal or make the simulator exit non-zero.
tasks.criteria:
tb_<ip>.sv exists and is non-empty
Optional tc/model files are listed or included correctly
DUT instantiation matches RTL top
Every SSOT scenario has executable stimulus and checker
scoreboard_events.jsonl rows include goal_id, scenario_id, cycle, stimulus, fl_expected, rtl_observed, passed, mismatch, and coverage_refs
VCD dump is configured
No RTL files were modified

tasks.content: [SSOT->VerilogTB] Run iverilog/vvp simulation and repair TB-only issues
tasks.activeForm: Running plain HDL simulation from SSOT - attempt {loop_count}/{max_loop_iterations}
tasks.detail: Run: iverilog -g2012 -I <ip>/rtl -f <ip>/list/<ip>.f <ip>/tb/tb_<ip>.sv -o <ip>/sim/<ip>.out && vvp <ip>/sim/<ip>.out. Fix TB-only compile, port mapping, task, and checker issues then rerun. If DUT behavior violates SSOT, stop TB edits and emit [SIM ESCALATE] -> rtl-gen with exact test, expected, got, and suspected RTL signal/file.
tasks.criteria:
Simulation command was run after final TB edit
Compile/elaboration exits 0
All SSOT scenarios pass or failures are escalated precisely
All non-blocked equivalence goals have scoreboard_events.jsonl evidence before DONE
No [FAIL] markers remain on DONE path
sim_report.txt or equivalent exists
TB does not modify RTL files

tasks.detail: Ensure <ip>/sim/<ip>.vcd, <ip>/sim/scoreboard_events.jsonl, <ip>/sim/sim_report.txt, <ip>/cov/coverage_functional.json when functional bins are tracked, and <ip>/sim/coverage_report.md exist on PASS path. Final <ip>/cov/coverage.json is produced by the common coverage stage. Label static/code coverage gaps honestly.
tasks.criteria:
VCD exists and is non-empty
scoreboard_events.jsonl exists and references equivalence goal IDs
sim_report.txt exists
raw functional coverage exists or evidence gap is escalated
Coverage source is labeled accurately
No IP-specific coverage workaround script was added

tasks.detail: PASS branch: emit [SSOT RESULT] tb-gen DONE with TB files, exact iverilog/vvp command, pass count, coverage path, VCD path, and next workflow sim_debug. FAIL branch: emit [SIM ESCALATE] -> rtl-gen blocks with exact expected/got evidence.
tasks.criteria:
DONE path includes fresh simulation evidence
Failure path includes precise SIM ESCALATE blocks
No simulation or coverage result is fabricated
